comptime WED = 2

        return 1
    return 0

code:
def reverse_in_place(mut v: List[Float64]):
    var i = 0
    var j = len(v) - 1
    while i < j:
        var tmp = v[i]
        v[i] = v[j]
        v[j] = tmp
        i += 1
        j -= 1

name: swap_nibbles
detail: /tmp/claude-1000/tmpo6vahfj0/b.mojo:2:22: error: statements must start at the beginning of a line
code:
def swap_nibbles(b: UInt64) -> UInt64:
    var lo = b & 0x0FULL
    var hi = (b >> 4) & 0x0FULL
    return (lo << 4) | hi

def swap_refs(mut a: Int, mut b: Int):
    var t = a
    a = b
    b = t

name: transpose
turn_right
code:
comptime D_NORTH = 0
comptime D_EAST = 1
comptime D_SOUTH = 2
comptime D_WEST = 3

def turn_right(dir: Int) -> Int:
    return (dir + 1) % 4

def turn_left(dir: Int) -> Int:
    return (dir + 3) % 4

name: weighted_mean3
code:
def weighted_mean3(a: Float64, wa: Float64, b: Float64, wb: Float64, c: Float64, wc: Float64) -> Float64:
    return (a * wa + b * wb + c * wc) / (wa + wb + wc)
